description: Sidebar Navigation: New sidebar for browsing libraries with smooth animations, dynamic scaling, and quick-access Shuffle, Genres, and Favorites buttons
Moonfin Plugin Integration: Server-synced ratings, settings, and preferences via the Moonfin server plugin with bidirectional settings sync across devices
Jellyseerr / Seerr Support: Browse trending and popular content, request media in HD or 4K, NSFW filtering, and global search integration
HDR10+ and Dolby Vision: Added HDR10+ support for HEVC/VP9 and Dolby Vision with SDR and HDR fallback
Redesigned Screens: Rebuilt library views, music album page, TV season/series details, and unified detail screen architecture
Playback Improvements: Automatic retry on failure, Live TV remux fallback, manual subtitle sync, and pre-playback track selection
MediaBar & Home Screen: Crossfade animations for featured items, refactored home layout, and updated row focus animations
Bug Fixes: Fixed crashes, playback reporting, skip segment focus, .strm file playback, subtitle positioning, and various navigation issues
Upstream Updates: Merged jellyfin-roku v3.1.0 through v3.1.5 with updated API endpoints
Special thanks to the Jellyfin Roku upstream project and all contributors!
author: @RadicalMuffinMan on GitHub
